queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the statistical impact of having no checking account on credit default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance below 0 DM.
queries.question: Determinants of default: Investigating the risk mitigation effects of a checking account balance below zero on borrower creditworthiness.

queries.feature_definition: Savings account status: savings below 100 DM.
queries.question: Credit risk drivers: Empirical evidence on the correlation between savings account balances below 100 DM and reduced default likelihood.
